divergence: Gunpowder was never discovered, so wars are settled by competitive committee
story_angle: consumer report reviewing the apocalypse's amenities, with star rating
headline: Committee War: Citizens Rank Void-Plazas by Ergonomic Suffering
deck: As institutional arbitration crumbles, customer satisfaction plummets into procedural disarray.
article:
After the Inter-Board Procedural Arbitration Office folded, citizens turned to ranking the new void-passage memo plazas strictly by how much physical misery they inflict. Early tallies already place seating angles and queue lengths at the center of every complaint.

Crimson-Prudence Void-Lounge sits at 1.5 stars after 327 reviews, its 47-degree benches blamed for six-jointed finger cramps. Local efficiency expert Azure-Discipline Bromfield filed a triplicate complaint on moss substrate, muttering that the chairs felt designed by someone who hated spines.

Slate-Humility recharge stations now issue only triplicate forms, producing a 78 percent spike in reported form dread. Corporate executive Violet-Efficiency Fleeb awarded the corridors three stars for throughput while ignoring the twelve-hour lines, insisting the numbers justified the wait.

The shift from committee combat to consumer scoring has left every plaza measured by the same narrow metric: how thoroughly it punishes the body before any memo moves forward.
author: Indigo-Graft Polyhistor, Bureaucratic Analyst Extraordinaire

oped.title: Ergonomic Suffering? More Like Ergonomic Enlightenment
oped.author: Lord Percival Voidwhistle, Eternal Chair of the Subcommittee on Subcommittee Expansion
oped.body: The so-called crisis of plummeting satisfaction is nothing but whinging from citizens too soft for proper procedure. Ranking our void-plazas by ergonomic suffering simply proves the system works: the more committee hours one endures, the stronger the republic becomes. My own plaza, #47, placed a dismal forty-third only because certain voters arrived wearing unauthorized neural hats that blocked the official pain receptors. Had they removed those millinery abominations and submitted to the mandated discomfort protocol, we would have placed first. The solution is obvious: form three new oversight committees to audit the hat situation, then another to rank the auditors. Anything less would be anarchy dressed as efficiency.

classifieds.text: Neural-gavel rig, pre-loaded with Void-Plaza #9 suffering metrics. Owner fleeing committee collapse, will trade for off-grid data shards.
Desperate need for freelance ergonomic auditors after today's ranking fiasco. Must survive procedural disarray; synth-coffee stipend only.
Found: Cracked citizen satisfaction implant, last synced during Plaza #47 committee war. Claim at terminal before it auto-voids.
Public apology from Arbiter Krell: My void-plaza rankings triggered the satisfaction plummet. Seeking settlement via non-competitive mediation.

panels.caption: Citizen jabs calipers into Void-Plaza Delta's bench: "Ninth-highest lumbar spike density this quarter."
Bureaucrat stamps the form: "Subcommittee voted the new 63-degree recline mandatory for dispute resolution."
"Top three plazas advance to the final arbitration. Losers get padded seats."

joke.setup: After the void-plaza committee war, Sector 9's new ergonomic audit declared every bench a neural-crush hazard.
joke.punchline: Citizens lined up anyway—said it was the only place left where the suffering felt officially measured.
joke.text: After the void-plaza committee war, Sector 9's new ergonomic audit declared every bench a neural-crush hazard. Citizens lined up anyway—said it was the only place left where the suffering felt officially measured.

sponsor_ads.headline: VoidBench 3000: Calibrated for Maximum Ergonomic Torment
sponsor_ads.body: Upgrade your plaza's ranking in tonight's citizen poll with servo-spines that pinch, twist, and log every micro-shift in real time.
sponsor_ads.tagline: War without gunpowder still demands proper lumbar support.™

sponsor_ads.headline: Committee Ordinance 447-B: Mandatory Plaza Re-Ranking Implants
sponsor_ads.body: Citizens must now hardwire suffering metrics directly to the central tally; non-compliance voids your vote in tomorrow's subcommittee deadlock.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Your discomfort is our democracy. Opt-out fees apply.

sponsor_ads.headline: NerveGrid Plaza Tiles: Live Suffering Telemetry Included
sponsor_ads.body: Every footfall transmits ergonomic agony scores to the war council, automatically adjusting your void-plaza's position in the current conflict standings.
sponsor_ads.tagline: No gunpowder. No mercy. Just better data.

sponsor_ads.headline: Subcommittee Survival Kits: Pre-Approved Discomfort Enhancers
sponsor_ads.body: Stock your local committee chamber with calibrated ache-inducers that guarantee higher citizen rankings without violating the no-explosives accord.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Results verified by tonight's headline poll. Void where prohibited by ergonomics board.

stories.headline: Moss-Graft Conglomerates Form Subcommittees to Audit Void-Plaza Ergonomics
stories.deck: Procedural synergy now requires six-jointed finger strain metrics before lease approval.
stories.article:
Moss-graft firms responded to the arbitration collapse by creating relocation committees that score every municipal plaza on documented discomfort. Concrete angles, bench rigidity, and average wait times must appear in triplicate before any district move is cleared.

Crimson Virtue Holdings logged a 47 percent rise in internal paperwork after its first cycle ranked Slate Atrium Plaza highest for suffering, citing its fourteen-hour deliberation benches as the decisive factor.

stories.headline: Committee Relay Finals Canceled After Quorum Failure in Seventh Inning
stories.deck: Teams now require moss-green skin tone verification before submitting final vote tallies.
stories.article:
The Inter-Board Memo Relay collapsed when Crimson Honesty could not gather the required nineteen signatures before the cybernetic deadline. Elongated fingers slowed stamping enough to trigger an automatic forfeit.

Spectators were ordered to stay seated while a fresh subcommittee decides whether future relays can proceed without reviving carbon copies, the very system the new plaza rankings were meant to replace.

stories.headline: Temple Elders Institute Moss-Graft Liturgy via Intercessory Memos
stories.deck: Divine arbitration now demands citizen satisfaction surveys before any prayer cycle concludes.
stories.article:
Void-temple elders swapped their six-jointed intercessors for automated relays that route prayers through corporate servers. Every supplicant must first complete an ergonomic suffering questionnaire that determines petition priority.

Access to the divine now routes through Slate Atrium Plaza, with forms due before the next bureaucratic equinox or the request is simply archived.

real_world_echo: Diamond giant De Beers halts work at flagship South African mine as demand plummets, mirrored in corporate moss-graft facilities idling as inter-board memo volume collapses post-dissolution
